overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in medieval armor riding a horse along a coastal mountain trail. The character discovers a massive whale carcass with scattered bones and a primitive camp, then continues along the shoreline before returning to the forested path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with ocean view

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a narrow dirt trail through dense coniferous forest with rocky cliffs on the left side

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with patches of grass and moss
dense pine and spruce trees lining the trail
narrow winding dirt path through the mountains
blue ocean visible through gaps in the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The character rides along a narrow dirt trail through dense mountain forest. Rocky cliffs rise on the left while coniferous trees line the right side of the path. The ocean is visible in the distance through gaps in the vegetation as the trail winds downhill.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal whale graveyard with primitive camp

events.description: exits dense forest into open coastal area revealing massive whale carcass
deer runs across the path from right to left in front of the horse

agents.ego_description: riding around the whale carcass and primitive camp, observing the massive skeleton and makeshift settlement

notable_agents.action: deer runs across the path from right to left, startling briefly before continuing into the bushes

entered.detail: massive decaying whale body with exposed flesh and rib bones
makeshift settlement with tents, wooden barrels, and stone structures
large rib bones and vertebrae scattered around the rocky ground
ancient stone monoliths near the camp entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide coastal area dominated by a massive whale carcass. The character rides around the decaying body and a primitive camp with stone structures and wooden barrels. A deer darts across the path, and scattered whale bones litter the rocky ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastline with whale ribs in water

events.description: moves from whale carcass area to rocky coastline with ribs protruding from the water

agents.ego_description: riding along the rocky shore past the whale ribs protruding from the ocean water

entered.detail: massive curved rib bones sticking out of the ocean water like white arches
rocky beach with scattered stones and tidal pools

segments.scene_description: The character rides along the rocky coastline where massive whale ribs protrude from the water like white arches. The shore is littered with smaller bones and rocky outcrops, with the ocean stretching to the horizon on the left.

events.description: turns inland away from the coast and re-enters dense forest vegetation

agents.ego_description: riding uphill through dense vegetation and trees, returning to the forested mountain interior

entered.detail: thick underbrush and bushes lining the trail
grassy hillside with scattered rocks and coniferous trees

segments.scene_description: The character turns inland away from the coast, re-entering dense forest. The trail becomes a dirt path again, winding uphill through thick vegetation and coniferous trees with rocky outcrops visible on the mountainside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded mountain forest down to a desolate coastal graveyard before returning to the dense woodland. It begins with the character riding along a narrow dirt trail winding downhill, flanked by rocky cliffs and coniferous trees with glimpses of the ocean through the vegetation. As the forest clears, the scene opens into a wide coastal area where the character navigates around a massive whale carcass and a primitive camp of stone structures and wooden barrels, while a deer darts across the bone-littered ground. The camera then follows the rider along the rocky shoreline, passing white whale ribs that protrude from the water like arches against the horizon. Finally, the path turns inland and climbs uphill, shifting from the open coast back into the thick vegetation and rocky outcrops of the mountain forest.
